creator: mi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mathieu Arnold from comment #11)
> You never set the _DEFAULTS variables by yourself.

These rules have changed so many times over the years, I may have lost track of the proper method du jour.

But it does not matter -- that step is, actually, optional. I think, the "default default" is currently 5.20 -- so, you'll see the problem on any machine, which currently has perl-5.20.N installed, where N<3.
